instructions.text: Circle the most important keywords in each note

notes.text: The Amazon rainforest produces 20% of Earth's oxygen
Photosynthesis uses sunlight and water to make energy
Mount Everest is 29,032 feet tall and located in the Himalayas
The human heart pumps blood throughout the entire body
Bees collect pollen from flowers to make honey

tryAgain.message: Circle: main topic + action + key facts
